title: ToyProto State Machine Schema
description: Reference state-machine rules for ToyProto clients and servers.

HANDSHAKING.behavior: Send HELLO_ACK then transition to READY, or send ERROR then close.

READY.behavior: Respond to PING and REQUEST; BYE transitions to CLOSING.

NEW.behavior: Send HELLO then transition to HANDSHAKING.

HANDSHAKING.behavior: HELLO_ACK transitions to READY; ERROR closes.

wrong_state_behavior: Wrong-state messages produce BAD_STATE when an authenticated ERROR can be returned; the server then closes the connection.
